title: Scytalia crinita
taxonomy: Scytalia crinita is classified as a species of beetle in the family Melyridae, which is a group of small to medium-sized beetles. This beetle is typically found in North America, and its classification helps scientists understand its evolutionary relationships with other similar species. The family Melyridae is part of the order Coleoptera, which includes all beetles. This classification reflects the beetle's physical characteristics and its place within the larger group of beetles. The classification of Scytalia crinita as a Melyridae beetle provides valuable information about its behavior, habitat, and other biological features.
